news.headline: Jeff Ettinger re-appointed to Hormel Foods Board of Directors, effective March 21, 2025. Hormel is a Fortune 500 company.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Hormel Foods Corporation revealed that Jeffrey M. Ettinger, the chairman of The Hormel Foundation, has been re-appointed to the Hormel Foods Board of Directors. The company, a Fortune 500 global branded food entity trading under NYSE: HRL, confirmed his return to the board effective March 21.

news.headline: Invesco Advisers, Inc. terminates distribution plans for Invesco High Income Trust II and Invesco Senior Income Trust.
news.summary: Atlanta, March 20, 2025 - Invesco Advisers, Inc., a subsidiary of Invesco Ltd. publicly announced that the Board of Trustees of Invesco High Income Trust II (NYSE: VLT) and Invesco Senior Income Trust (NYSE: VVR) has implemented immediate changes. As of today, the Board has taken action regarding the mentioned investment funds. The companies' stocks are listed under the ticker symbols VLT and VVR on the New York Stock Exchange.

news.headline: CCHI acquires former memory care community in Highland Park, IL to create inclusive living spaces. Major step forward for initiative.
news.summary: A former memory care community in Highland Park, Illinois has been acquired by the Collaborative Community Housing Initiative as of March 20, 2025. This acquisition signifies a major advancement for CCHI, demonstrating its dedication to transforming communities.

news.headline: United States Steel Corp. projects a net loss of $0.49-$0.53/share for Q1 2025 with predicted EBITDA of $125 million.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, United States Steel Corporation (NYSE: X) announced their projected first quarter 2025 adjusted net earnings to fall between ($0.53) and ($0.49) per diluted share. The adjusted EBITDA for the same period is forecasted to be around $125 million. CEO David B. Burritt stated that the $125 million adjusted EBITDA guidance aligns with their previous expectations for the first quarter. This guidance primarily pertains to the commercial operations in the North American Flat-Rolled segment.

news.headline: Alan Felder named Independent Trustee of Diversified Healthcare Trust Board, previously Head of Real Estate at UBS.
news.summary: A healthcare company based in Newton, Massachusetts, Diversified Healthcare Trust (Nasdaq: DHC), has recently appointed Alan Felder as an Independent Trustee on its Board of Trustees. This decision is effective immediately. With over 20 years of experience at UBS Investment Bank, Felder held various positions including Head of Real Estate, Lodging, and Leisure, Americas. He also served as the Head of Private Financing Markets, Americas, and as a Managing Director in the Mergers & Acquisitions division.

news.headline: Chimera Investment Corp declared $0.37 Q1 dividend, payable on April 30, 2025 to shareholders as of March 31, 2025.
news.summary: In New York, the Board of Directors of Chimera Investment Corporation has declared a first quarter cash dividend of $0.37 per common share. This dividend will be payable on April 30, 2025, to shareholders of record as of March 31, 2025. The ex-dividend date is also March 31, 2025. Chimera Investment Corporation is a publicly traded real estate investment trust focusing on investing for itself and unrelated third parties.

news.headline: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE: AVB) named USA Today Top Workplace for 2025. Program surveyed 20M+ employees, recognized top orgs across 60 markets. Over 42,000 orgs invited to participate.
news.summary: A property management company, AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE: AVB), headquartered in Arlington, Virginia, has recently been honored as one of the USA Today's Top Workplaces for the year 2025. This prestigious recognition is a result of the Top Workplaces program, known for surveying over 20 million employees annually and identifying leading organizations across 60 different markets. Out of the 42,000 organizations invited to partake in this year's survey, AvalonBay Communities emerged as a winner based on valuable feedback from associates collected through an employee engagement survey. This accolade signifies the company's commitment to fostering a positive work environment and prioritizing employee satisfaction.

news.headline: UDR, Inc. has been named a 2025 Top Workplace by USA Today and Energage, following previous recognitions and awards.
news.summary: UDR, Inc. revealed that they have been named a 2025 Top Workplace by USA Today and Energage. This accolade comes after the company was recognized as a 2024 Top Workplace and received Culture Excellence Awards in Employee Appreciation and Professional Development. As a leading multifamily real estate investment trust, UDR continues to prioritize creating a positive workplace culture. More information on UDR's efforts to cultivate a strong workplace environment can be found on their Top Workplace page.

news.headline: Pastors get exclusive access to The Chosen Season 5 Sermon Kits for Easter engagement; collaboration with Come and See, Gloo, and Outreach Inc. announced.
news.summary: Come and See, a collaboration between Outreach Inc. and Gloo, has partnered to provide churches with access to preview footage and ministry resources from The Chosen. This initiative was announced in Boulder, Colorado on March 20, 2025. The organization aims to connect pastors with valuable resources from the widely popular TV series.

news.headline: Micron Q2 earnings beat with revenue reaching $8.05B, data center sales tripling, EPS at $1.56/share. Shares surge.
news.summary: Micron Technology Inc released its second-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations. The second-quarter revenue stood at $8.05 billion, exceeding the consensus estimate of $7.89 billion and reflecting a notable increase from $5.82 billion year-over-year. The company reported adjusted earnings of $1.56 per share, beating analyst projections of $1.42 per share from Benzinga Pro. Micron's operating cash flow for the quarter amounted to $3.94 billion, showing improvement from the prior quarter's $3.24 billion. For a detailed analysis, the full article can be found online.

news.headline: Playing For Change & Visit Mississippi release new song "Crossroads" celebrating music heritage. Los Angeles, Mar 20, 2025.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Los Angeles, Playing For Change, a Certified B Corp and worldwide music collective that aims to inspire and unite people through music, has released a new Song Around The World titled "Crossroads". This initiative is part of their ongoing efforts to connect individuals through music and promote positive change globally.

news.headline: FedEx's Q3 earnings miss with $4.51/share (est. $4.54/share), but revenue beats with $22.2 billion (est. $21.89 billion). Stocks decline.
news.summary: FedEx Corp. (NYSE: FDX) unveiled its third-quarter results after Thursday's market close. In the quarter, the company reported earnings of $4.51 per share, falling short of the analyst consensus of $4.54. However, quarterly revenue surpassed expectations, reaching $22.2 billion compared to the estimated $21.89 billion. This is an increase from last year's revenue of $21.7 billion for the same period. The CEO of Darden Restaurants noted that consumers are expected to continue spending. For more information, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Trump: Signing deal shortly with Ukraine on rare earths.
Former Washington Post members call for CEO Will Lewis replacement, citing a disconnect.
news.summary: In an email communication, a clear division has emerged between the CEO, Will Lewis, and the individuals who contributed to transforming The Post into a significant presence in American journalism.

news.headline: Trump: We are doing well with Ukraine and Russia.
$177M raised by Uniswap Foundation as Ethereum DeFi users anticipate fee sharing; over 80% governance votes approve new proposals.
news.summary: Over 80% of participants in the governance process supported two new proposals to provide funding for the initiatives of the Uniswap Foundation.

news.headline: Attorney Michael Zisser wins $4M settlement for injured union steamfitter who fell from ladder.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, attorney Michael Zisser from Wingate, Russotti, Shapiro, Moses & Halperin, LLP, achieved a significant win for a 56-year-old union steamfitter. The worker, who fell from a ladder while on duty, received a $4 million settlement as a result of the case.

news.headline: Permianville Royalty Trust filed its Annual Report on Form 10-K for year ended Dec 31, 2024 with SEC on March 19, 2025.
news.summary: Permianville Royalty Trust (NYSE: PVL) based in Houston, released its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ending December 31, 2024, which was officially filed with the SEC on March 19, 2025. Investors can access the report on the company's website, www.permianvilleroyaltytrust.com, or on the SEC's website, www.sec.gov. Unit holders of the Trust are also able to request a physical copy of the comprehensive report.

news.headline: Judge halts DOGE inquiry into Social Security data, with deadlines pushed to December.
Nike, Inc. reports Q3 2025 revenues of $11.3 billion, down 9% from previous year. Nike Direct revenues at $4.7 billion.
news.summary: Sportswear giant NIKE, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) announced its fiscal 2025 third-quarter financial results, ending on February 28, 2025. The company reported third-quarter revenues of $11.3 billion, reflecting a 9% decrease on a reported basis from the previous year and a 7% decrease on a currency-neutral basis. NIKE Direct revenues amounted to $4.7 billion, marking a 12% decline on a reported basis and a 10% decrease on a currency-neutral basis. Wholesale revenues stood at $6.2 billion, down 7% on a reported basis.

news.headline: Context Therapeutics releases 2024 financial and operational outcomes.
Medical review finds increase in lung diseases among artificial stone workers due to dust exposure. Silicosis cases rising.
news.summary: A recent in-depth study reveals a significant increase in severe lung diseases caused by exposure to artificial stone dust in Novato, California. Published in the Journal of Occupational Medicine and Toxicology on March 20, 2025, the analysis highlights a concerning spike in accelerated silicosis cases and other related conditions. This research sheds light on the growing issue, emphasizing the urgent need for measures to address this health concern.

news.headline: KinderCare reports Q4 2024 financial results: Revenue $647.0 million, operating loss $89.3 million, net loss $133.6 million.
news.summary: KinderCare Learning Companies, Inc. (NYSE: KLC), a prominent early childhood education provider, has released its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on December 28, 2024. The results indicate revenue of $647.0 million, with a loss from operations amounting to $89.3 million and a net loss of $133.6 million. The net loss per common share, diluted (1), was recorded at $1.17. The company has also issued guidance for the upcoming year 2025.

news.headline: Trump is invoking emergency powers to boost the ability of the US to produce critical minerals.
Empire State Realty Trust schedules first quarter 2025 earnings release & call. Details to follow.
news.summary: Empire State Realty Trust, based in New York, has declared the dates for its First Quarter 2025 Earnings Release and Conference Call. The announcement was made via Business Wire. Investors and stakeholders can mark their calendars for this important event to take place. Further details regarding the earnings and financial performance of Empire State Realty Trust during this quarter will be disclosed during the conference call. This event is crucial for those interested in the company's progress and results.

news.headline: Green Brick promotes Bobby Samuel to Executive VP of Land; helped company grow as a top homebuilder.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas, Green Brick Partners, Inc. (NYSE: GRBK) has promoted Bobby Samuel to Executive Vice President of Land. This move acknowledges Mr. Samuel's key role in the company's success, with Green Brick being recognized by Fortune Magazine for six consecutive years as one of the fastest-growing public homebuilders and land development firms in the nation. This promotion highlights Samuel's contributions to Green Brick's expansion.

news.headline: Alight, Inc. (NYSE: ALIT) sets mid-term financial targets at investor day. Executives share strategy with clients. Panels discuss employee wellbeing.
news.summary: A major cloud-based human capital and technology services provider, Alight, Inc. (NYSE: ALIT), held an investor day in Chicago. The company’s executives unveiled their strategic plan and set mid-term financial goals during the session. Furthermore, they conducted discussions with Alight clients and external assessors. Clients shared insights on collaborating with Alight to ensure their staff's financial security and overall well-being. This event aimed to shed light on the company's operations and objectives for interested investors.

news.headline: $NKE Nike Q3 2024 Earnings
NANOBIOTIX presents data from 2 Phase 1 studies on JNJ-1900 for lung cancer at ELCC. Expanding treatment possibilities for patients.
news.summary: Paris and Cambridge, Massachusetts, March 20, 2025 - Late-clinical stage biotechnology firm, NANOBIOTIX (Euronext: NANO – NASDAQ: NBTX), disclosed poster presentations from two Phase 1 studies investigating JNJ-1900 (NBTXR3) for individuals with lung cancer (NSCLC) at the 2025 European Lung Cancer Conference ("ELCC"). The company, known for pioneering nanoparticle-based therapeutic solutions, aims to broaden treatment options for cancer and other prevalent diseases. The studies focus on patients with NSCLC, highlighting the potential of JNJ-1900 as a treatment avenue.

news.headline: PLBY Group's Special Meeting adjourned on March 20, 2025 due to lack of quorum. No business conducted. (total words: 22)
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Los Angeles, PLBY Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: PLBY), a prominent company in pleasure and leisure lifestyles owning the iconic Playboy brand, disclosed that their Special Meeting of Stockholders convened at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time had to be adjourned as no business could be conducted. This was due to the absence of the necessary quorum.

news.headline: SEALSQ reveals FY 2024 financial results, sets plan for 2025. Conference on March 24 at 10:00am ET.
news.summary: A press release from Geneva, Switzerland, dated March 20, 2025, announced that a conference call and webcast have been scheduled for Monday, March 24 at 10:00 am Eastern Time (3:00 pm Central European Time).

news.headline: EXL to host investor event on May 6 in New York - ExlService Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: EXLS) to update strategy at NASDAQ MarketSite in Times Square.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, ExlService Holdings, Inc., a worldwide data and AI corporation trading under the symbol EXLS on NASDAQ, revealed plans for an upcoming investor strategy update session scheduled for May 6 at the NASDAQ MarketSite located in Times Square, New York. This event aims to provide stakeholders with insights into the company's strategic outlook and future plans.

news.headline: Third Coast Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBX) declares $16.88 quarterly dividend on 6.75% Series A Convertible Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Third Coast Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBX), the parent company of Third Coast Bank, revealed a dividend update. The Board of Directors stated a quarterly cash dividend of $16.88 per share for its 6.75% Series A Convertible Non-Cumulative Preferred stock.

news.headline: Danaher Corp (NYSE: DHR) schedules Q1 2025 earnings call at 8:00 am ET on April 22, 2025, lasting one hour.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Danaher Corporation (NYSE: DHR) revealed plans to livestream its Q1 2025 earnings conference call on Tuesday, April 22, 2025, starting at 8:00 a.m. ET for an expected duration of about one hour. This event aims to provide insights into the company's financial performance and future strategies.

news.headline: Neogen Corporation to release third-quarter earnings on April 9, 2025, followed by webcast and conference call.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Lansing, Michigan, Neogen® Corporation (NASDAQ: NEOG) announced that they will be releasing their third-quarter earnings report on April 9, 2025, before the market opens. The company's executives will then conduct a webcast and conference call on the same morning to discuss the financial results and address any queries.

news.headline: Kimbell Royalty Partners to release Q1 2025 earnings on March 20, 2025. Owns interests in 130,000 gross wells across 28 states.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas on March 20, 2025, Kimbell Royalty Partners, LP (NYSE: KRP) disclosed plans to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2025. Kimbell, a prominent provider of mineral and royalty interests in oil and natural gas, possesses ownership in over 130,000 gross wells spread across 28 states in the US.

news.headline: LiqTech (NASDAQ: LIQT) to discuss Q4 and FY 2024 results on March 28, 2025, in Denmark at 9:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Executives will conduct a conference call on Friday, March 28, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time in BALLERUP, Denmark. LiqTech International, Inc. (NASDAQ: LIQT), a company known for its high-tech filtration solutions, is set to host the event. The corporation specializes in producing and promoting advanced filtration products and systems.

news.headline: Trump signs action boosting US critical minerals output.
Planet Labs PBC releases Pelican-2 images of Port of Laem Chabang in Thailand taken on March 12, 2025, from 506km altitude.
news.summary: Planet Labs PBC, a top provider of Earth data, shared initial images from its Pelican-2 satellite of Thailand's Port of Laem Chabang, the main deep sea port in the country. Captured on March 12, 2025, from about 506 km above, the images showcase the port's details. The Pelican-2 satellite was launched through SpaceX’s Transporter-12 Rideshare mission on January 14, 2025. The company expressed satisfaction with the imagery quality.

news.headline: Ouster reports record revenue with $30 million in Q4 2024, up 23% YoY, shipping over 4,800 sensors.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Ouster, Inc. (Nasdaq: OUST), a top global provider of high-performance lidar sensors and software solutions for various industries, disclosed its financial outcomes for the periods ending December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, the company reported revenue of $30 million, reflecting a 23% increase year over year and a 7% increase sequentially. During this period, they successfully shipped over 4,800 sensors generating revenue.

news.headline: Dyne Therapeutics names Erick J. Lucera as CFO, known for expertise in capital allocation and shareholder value creation.
news.summary: A highly experienced financial leader with a proven track record of success brings over two decades of expertise in capital allocation, business development, and maximizing shareholder value creation.

news.headline: Palomar Holdings, Inc. acquires Advanced AgProtection in definitive agreement.
news.summary: Today, Palomar Holdings, Inc. disclosed its agreement to purchase Advanced AgProtection (AAP). The acquisition marks a significant move for Palomar, a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker PLMR. This acquisition showcases Palomar's strategic growth plans, further solidifying its position in the market. The deal is expected to have implications on both companies’ portfolios, with Palomar likely benefiting from AAP's specialized services. This acquisition highlights Palomar's dedication to expanding its offerings and market presence.

news.headline: Domo introduces new features for data product development, streamlining collaboration, and accelerating decision-making. #DOMO #DP25
news.summary: In Utah's Silicon Slopes, Domo (Nasdaq: DOMO) unveiled groundbreaking platform upgrades at Domopalooza 2025. The enhancements redefine how businesses develop, structure, and engage with data products, aiming to enhance collaboration, expedite decision-making, and convert data insights into tangible business results. These advances aim to minimize the time spent by teams on content searches. Domo's focus is on empowering customers to not just visualize but also efficiently utilize their data.

news.headline: SiriusXM appoints Anjali Sud to Board of Directors as Vice Chairman James E. Meyer steps down. New independent director.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on March 20, 2025, Sirius XM Holdings Inc. revealed that Vice Chairman James E. Meyer will be resigning from the Board. This decision comes as the company welcomes Anjali Sud as a new independent director to the Board of Directors. Sud, recognized for her successful career as an executive, brings a fresh perspective to the company. Sirius XM Holdings Inc., listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SIRI, continues to adapt to changes in its leadership team while maintaining a commitment to growth and innovation.

news.headline: Pacific Cascade Legal in Portland celebrates National Single Parent Day on March 21, 2025, honoring the challenges and triumphs of single parents.
news.summary: A law firm based in Portland, Oregon, Pacific Cascade Legal, will celebrate National Single Parent Day on March 21, 2025. The firm specializes in offering legal services to families in the Pacific Northwest region. This day is dedicated to acknowledging the special difficulties and successes of single parents.

news.headline: Simon Property Group announces retirement of long-time Independent Director Allan B. Hubbard.
news.summary: In a press release dated March 20, 2025, Simon®, a real estate investment trust specializing in premier shopping, dining, entertainment, and mixed-use destinations, revealed the retirement of Mr. Allan B. Hubbard, one of its most experienced Independent Directors. This news marks a significant change in the board composition, highlighting the departure of a key figure in the company's leadership.

news.headline: Motorsport Games discloses Q4 and full year 2024 financials. Key numbers for investors posted online.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Motorsport Games Inc. (NASDAQ: MSGM) shared its financial performance for Q4 and the fiscal year ending December 31, 2024. The company released earnings slides for Q4 and fiscal year-end 2024 showcasing significant milestones achieved during and after the period. Interested parties can view these slides on the Company’s investor relations webpage.

news.headline: Greenlane Renewables reports strong financial performance in FY 2024: Adjusted EBITDA up by 80%, balance sheet cash rose by 35%.
news.summary: Greenlane Renewables Inc. reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended December 31, 2024. Highlights include adjusted EBITDA improvement of over 80%, with a loss of $1.7 million for the fiscal year, annual revenue of $51.8 million, gross profit of $15.4 million, and a net loss of $1.3 million. In the fourth quarter, adjusted EBITDA was a loss of $0.2 million, revenue was $8.5 million, gross profit was $3.6 million, and net income was $1.9 million. The company's cash position strengthened by 35% to $16.2 million, and G&A cost run rate reduced by 25%. They also announced new contracts, patent applications, and international expansion efforts. Overall, the company is entering 2025 with a strong financial foundation for strategic growth.

news.headline: Torrid announces positive fourth-quarter fiscal results for 2024 with revenue of $617 million and plans for fiscal 2025.
news.summary: In City of Industry, California, Torrid Holdings Inc. (NYSE: CURV), a leading direct-to-consumer brand for women sizes 10 to 30 in North America, revealed its financial performance for the quarter ending February 1, 2025. Lisa Harper, the CEO, highlighted the company's achievement at the conclusion of fiscal 2024, citing positive outcomes driven by product innovation and a favorable customer reception to their latest offerings.

news.headline: Arcadia Biosciences (RKDA) reports strong 2024 results with an 80% revenue growth in Zola coconut water.
news.summary: In Dallas, Arcadia Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: RKDA) announced their financial and business performance for Q4 and full year 2024. President and CEO T.J. Schaefer expressed satisfaction with the year, especially post the sale of GoodWheat™ assets. The company's emphasis on Zola® coconut water resulted in an impressive 80% revenue increase during the period.
